title: Regional Express Holdings Limited — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: The NSW Supreme Court found Regional Express Holdings Limited (Rex) breached its continuous disclosure obligations over a 28 February 2023 profit forecast, having lacked reasonable grounds from 14 April 2023 to expect a positive FY23 operating profit before disclosing a $35 million operational loss forecast on 20 June 2023. Former executive chair Lim Kim Hai admitted contraventions and accepted a pecuniary penalty and disqualification; ASIC's case against three non-executive directors was unsuccessful and they were cleared.
scope: Found by the NSW Supreme Court to have breached continuous disclosure obligations over a profit forecast; Former executive chair admitted contraventions and accepted a pecuniary penalty and disqualification; Three non-executive directors were separately found not to have breached their duties
